name: MY Company Funding
description_short: MY Company Funding is a credit repair provider based in Austin, Texas. Rated 4.3/5 with 23 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
MY Company Funding is a credit repair provider serving clients in Austin, Texas. Carrying a 4.3/5.0 Google rating from 23 reviews, MY Company Funding has an strong reputation among consumers in the Austin area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a business management consultant, MY Company Funding provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Austin, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. MY Company Funding operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Austin, Texas area who are considering MY Company Funding should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
